name: Manila
industries: BPO and global shared services lead, with banking digitisation and infrastructure programmes adding demand.
intro: Manila's BPO and shared-services industry employs over a million people, and its career ladder has a clear rung where certification becomes mandatory: the move from team lead to programme or delivery manager. Employers across BGC, Makati and Ortigas reimburse PMP and Scrum courses because certified managers are what clients contractually require. Beyond outsourcing, the banks' digitisation race and the government's infrastructure push add steady demand. Our live online weekend batch runs on the IST schedule, converting to 11:30 AM – 8:30 PM Philippine time — no EDSA traffic, no leave forms, one weekend. English-language instruction with an international cohort matches the global-client environment Manila professionals already work in. Afterwards you get exam application guidance, realistic full-length mocks, and direct trainer access for doubts until you clear the exam.

faq.q: What are the class timings in Manila?
faq.a: Live classes run 09:00 AM – 06:00 PM IST, which is 11:30 AM – 08:30 PM PHT in Manila. You can pick a weekend (Sat–Sun) or a weekday (Wed–Thu) cohort; each completes the course over two consecutive days.

faq.q: Is the training online or at a venue in Manila?
faq.a: All batches are 100% live online, taught by an instructor over video with interactive exercises — there is no venue to travel to in Manila. You need a laptop, a stable connection and a free weekend.

faq.q: Is the certificate different if I attend from Philippines?
faq.a: No. The certification is issued by the same global body regardless of where you attend from, and holds identical recognition with employers in Philippines and internationally.

faq.q: Can my employer in Manila sponsor the course?
faq.a: Yes. We issue invoices suitable for corporate sponsorship and reimbursement, and most employers in Philippines accept them under learning and development budgets. Group pricing is available for teams.

meta.title: {course} Training in Manila — Live Online Weekend Batches
meta.description: Live online {course} certification training for Manila: upcoming weekend batch dates in your local time, salary data with sources, and exam cost.
